diagrams.title: McCall's Quality Model Pyramid
diagrams.description: Three-tier hierarchical structure showing 11 quality factors categorized by product operation, revision, and transition
diagrams.purpose: Visualize all 11 quality factors and understand their groupings for easier memorization

diagrams.title: CMM Maturity Levels Staircase
diagrams.description: Five-level staircase showing evolutionary software process improvement from Initial to Optimizing
diagrams.purpose: Understand progression of organizational maturity and what each level represents

diagrams.title: Fishbone Diagram Structure
diagrams.description: Cause-and-effect diagram with head showing problem and 6M categories for causes
elements: Horizontal spine connecting causes to effect
diagrams.purpose: Use as template for root cause analysis of quality problems

diagrams.title: PDCA Continuous Improvement Cycle
diagrams.description: Circular diagram showing four phases of continuous improvement process
diagrams.purpose: Remember the continuous improvement cycle for quality management

visuals.title: Software Quality Models
visuals.description: Visual diagram for software quality models
